data.name: 催眠典獄長
data.detailed_description:
◆故事簡介

死忠粉絲的傑克因為斗內太多而負債被關進監獄城，然而監獄城的典獄長外表卻神似單推的偶像主播小雪，好巧不巧，傑克之前觀看小雪雜談時偶然覺醒了催眠的能力，無敵了的傑克究竟是會幫助單推的偶像好好抓壞人，還是會趁機用催眠能力玩弄一番呢?

◆玩法要素

回歸簡單的ADV文字冒險遊戲，只有少少的選項，但是內容絕對夠色，都是作者看直播許久的妄想。

◆遊戲特色

劇情絕對夠色，覺得不夠色歡迎提供建議

富含催眠與露出情節
與現實有些呼應，玩過前作金斧偶像的朋友應該會了解。

data.short_description: 北方監獄城的典獄長銀小雪，如此尊貴的女人，竟然被我催眠了!
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: intel i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Hypnosis Prison
data.detailed_description:
◆Story

Jack, a petty criminal, finds himself imprisoned in the freezing northern Prison City. He is immediately put to work and assigned all sorts of odd jobs and duties by Warden Snow. Despite being treated as a disposable tool, Jack has a secret up his sleeve: he possesses the ability to hypnotize people. However, he needs to train and refine this skill before he can use it effectively. With determination, Jack declares, "Humph! Arrogant warden, I will make you kneel before me and beg like a dog! Fear the power of hypnosis."

◆Gameplay

Each day you will be assigned a task by your superior. Complete it using your newfound abilities. As you endure the harsh conditions of the prison, focus on honing and mastering your hypnosis to one day use it on Warden Snow and ultimately escape. But don’t forget to have some naughty fun in the process!

◆Game Features

◇ Fun and entertaining adult dating sim
◇ Naughty plot involving hypnosis
◇ Engaging scenes that will surely satisfy your appetite
◇ A standalone story set in the same universe as Golden Axe Idol
◇ A massive script comprising over 100,000 words

data.short_description: The world is frozen over and you are locked in Prison City with no way out. But you can turn your situation around by using hypnosis on the prison’s inhabitants. I will hypnotize you, high and mighty Warden Snow!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 64bit
  • Processor: intel i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:

  • Processor: intel i5
